entry.title: How to transport request between tenants in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi SAP guys, 

 

I am studying how to transports request between the tenants of the new sap s/4 hana public cloud. 

 

I learn how to create new requests and release with the app Export Customizing transports, but in the app for import/transport the request I am getting a message that my tenant cannot able to import/transport the request. Can you explain to me how to transports requests between diffrent tenants there, I have the 100 and the 080(developer tenant). 

Best regards, Marcelo Oliveira.

entry.title: How to disable substitutions for My Inbox in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP support,

 

How can we disable substitutions for My Inbox for public cloud?

 

Thanks,

 

Ben

entry.title: Timesheet Approval BADI SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

Our client is looking to implement Timesheet Approval for enterprise projects, and I'm currently working on the BADI (HCM_CATS_V1_APPROVER_DETRMN). However, I am struggling to find an appropriate logic for its implementation. If anyone has experience with this, I would appreciate your advice.

Thank you!

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Human Resources

entry.title: Download Material Document xml
entry.content:
I would like to know how to download xml file of Material Document form template in s4hana.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Regarding the rounding of consumption tax in public cloud
entry.content:
Dear colleague:
 
We have found that SAP Public Cloud currently handles consumption tax as a round down. My client would like to change it to rounding.
 
My understanding is to add the condition type in 101120 and then change the Rounding rule to Commercial in the condition type. And assign the newly added condition type to the Calculation Procedure.Below are my questions：
 
①In the GUI, we can assign the additional condition type to the Calculation Procedure through 'Check Calculation Procedure', but I couldn't find the relevant configuration in Public Cloud. How should I add the condition Type to the Calculation Procedure?
②If we cannot add a new condition type to the Calculation Procedure, we attempt to change the rounding rule of the existing condition type to Commercial. But I found that even if I changed it to 'Rounding rule' to 'Commercial' or 'Round up', it still executes as' Round down .Has anyone encountered a similar situation before?
 
Thank you and Bestregards.
 
Wang

entry.title: 关于公有云中消费税的四舍五入
entry.content:
您好！
我们发现，SAP公共云目前将消费税作为向下舍入处理。我的客户想把它改成四舍五入。
我的理解是在101120中添加条件类型，然后将条件类型中的舍入规则更改为Commercial。并将新添加的条件类型分配给计算过程。以下是我的问题：
① 在GUI中，我们可以通过“检查计算过程”将附加条件类型分配给计算过程，但我在公共云中找不到相关配置。我应该如何将条件类型添加到计算过程中？
② 如果我们无法在计算过程中添加新的条件类型，我们会尝试将现有条件类型的舍入规则更改为Commercial。但我发现，即使我将其更改为“Round down”、“Commercial”或“Round up”，它仍然以“Round up”向下舍入的形式执行。请问原因是什么？有人有相同的情况么？
 
谢谢！
 
Wang

entry.title: User Login wise Documents restriction access needed (S4 Hana Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Step 1 : SAP User 1 Created sales order 1 , 2 

Step : 2 SAP User 2 Created Sales Order 3 , 4 

Currently, SAP user 2 can open and change sales orders created by user 1. This means the system lacks data ownership control. This needs to be addressed.

entry.title: Is it possible to add new condition tables for condition contract in sap public cloud ?
entry.content:
hello,

I would like to know if it's possible to create new condition tables to be used in condition contracts. For example when creating condition contracts for external commissions I would like to differentiate the amount of the commission according to the material group.

Currently,  only tables 163 and 4AB are available in the dropdown list. I have tried to copy these tables adding the field I need but still not able to add them in the condition contract.

Thanks in advance,

Edoardo

entry.title: supplier invoice gets posted without accountant release
entry.content:
Hello experts ,

 

scenario :

when Po is posted and invoice received with higher amount while posting by accountant when accountant posted with amount received as  save as completed instead of post .

now it triggers the workflow of purchaser and he release as he accept the price difference and it which is in supplier invoice . 

but now it should goes to accountant to post instead it goes for approval workflow and for posted invoice when purchase reelases it automatically get posted status .

 

could someone suggest what will be the issue of it .

entry.title: How to schedule fqm_delete for snapshot cleanup in public cloud system
entry.content:
1. App Delete data from one exposure from operations message log display "Execution is cancelled since regular deletion job is scheduled."
  2. FQM_DELETE log message is displayed on deletion of snapshot in public cloud "Execution is cancelled since regular deletion job is scheduled."
  3. The option to delete redundant snapshot is not available.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can I find the source field of a target field in S4Hana cloud?
entry.content:
In the billing document Header Detail, under Taxes, I have a field called "VAT Registration No.". I need to know what the source field of this field is and which business partner role it comes from (Payer, BillTo, ShipTo). 

The general question of how to find the source field of a target field frequently comes up in other situations, too.

entry.title: How to add one Business Catalog into two Business Roles?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

Please help us to know how we can authorize one catalog in two roles.

 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Access Control Concern Regarding Journal Entry Apps
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question regarding the following apps: Verify General Journal Entries, Manage Journal Entries, and Post General Journal Entries.

For one of our customers, the intended process is that users should handle journal entries exclusively through the Verify General Journal Entries app. This approach is in place to ensure proper control and that approval workflows are followed before any postings are made.

However, we have identified that it is still possible to bypass this process.

Issue Identified:

  • The Manage Journal Entries app remains accessible through certain roles/catalogs
  • This app includes the "Create" function, which allows users to post journal entries directly—outside of the intended approval process.

Furthermore, the Post General Journal Entries app is also accessible via these roles/catalogs, enabling posting without prior verification.

This setup does not align with the defined access strategy for the customer and poses a risk of journal entries being posted without appropriate validation.

 

We have noted that the catalog SAP_FIN_BC_GL_CLOSING_PC cannot be removed, as it includes access to several apps that are actively used. However, the issue is that this catalog also grants access to the Manage Journal Entries app.

We would appreciate any guidance or recommendations on how to handle this situation while preserving access to the necessary apps.

entry.title: Exporting list from "Test Your Processes"
entry.content:
In "Test Your Processes" app, is it possible to download/export the list of processes steps with actions?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Clarification on CTS Dependencies
entry.content:
I would like to gain a clear understanding of how CTS (Change and Transport System) dependencies are established.

In what cases do CTS dependencies occur?  

-> As one case example, we recently made modifications to two different GL accounts (let’s refer to them as GL Account 1 and GL Account 2).  

1.1) The changes made to both GL accounts were identical (only internal details of the GL account were modified).  

1.2) Each modification was included in separate CTS transports — GL Account 1 was included in Transport 1, and GL Account 2 in Transport 2.  

1.3) We observed that Transport 1 has a lock token and cannot be ignored, whereas Transport 2 has no lock token and can be released independently.

Although these changes were processed in separate CTS requests and have no shared components (e.g., they are not assigned to the same financial statement version or any common structure), they still appear to be treated as dependent.

 

We would like to understand: Why are these two CTS transports not treated independently? What triggers such dependencies, and how are they technically formed?

To summarize: We would like detailed insight into the scenarios that may cause dependencies between CTS transports, especially in the context of GL account changes.

Since we believe each CTS request should be managed independently, we are also inquiring whether it is possible to remove or avoid such dependencies, to ensure isolated transport of individual changes.

Currently, due to these unexpected CTS dependencies, even test CTS requests are being transported together.

This is having a significant impact on our internal audit process on the customer side.

We appreciate your guidance and expertise on this matter.

Best regards,

Min Sun 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Impossibile to deliver CBFD Deliv.Free of Charge and SD2 - Replcmnt Deliv. Ord.
entry.content: We cannot able to deliver order CBFD Deliv.Free of Charge and SD2 - Replcmnt Deliv. Ord. Impossibile to find stock

entry.title: 2SL Transport management
entry.content:
Hello, I do configurations on Test/Quality system of the 2 system landscape. How do I transport the configuration made in CBC and tested in Quality to Production? I am used to the 3SL but in the Export Customizing Transports app I am not able to do it in 2SL. 

Based on this document, I was able to find a button "Release Transport" from Quality to Production. What happens when I press it? I want to check what I am sending to the Production beforehand. I dont want to send something that should stay in the Quality system.
Is there any application where I can see and edit the transport content? Because in the 3SL you can go into more details and see tasks of the request in Export Customizing Transports. 

Also, it is my understanding that in Production, I import the configuration via Import Collection app like in 3SL, right? 

Many thanks

entry.title: Send an email with a screenshot of my Service Quotation
entry.content:
Good afternoon

Please your help.

I want to send an email in SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition with the button that is the right corner of my Service Quotation.

But I want to send a screenshot of the app instead of the link of the page.

Is there a way to send an automatic screenshot of the app by email?

Thanks in advanced!
